source_areas.description: Stable package exports and orchestration API for loading, searching, expanding, learning, and outcome reporting.
Deterministic loading, search, intent matching, template substitution, composition, validation, fingerprinting, learning, and scoring.
Abstract persistence contract and memory, SQLite, and Firestore implementations for learned blueprint state.
Packaged YAML blueprint resources, composition blocks, and MCP-compatible tool schema definitions.
Source-backed generation for implementation declarations, packaged catalog entries, and MCP input schemas.

feature_surfaces.title: Packaged blueprint catalog
feature_surfaces.description: Loads packaged workflow patterns and reusable blocks for browser, API, data, file, image, document, monitoring, and notification work.

feature_surfaces.title: Search and intent matching
feature_surfaces.description: Ranks deterministic text matches and optionally combines expanded queries, embeddings, and tracked intent signals.

feature_surfaces.title: Expansion and composition
feature_surfaces.description: Substitutes arguments, expands blocks, chains patterns, rewrites step references, and validates generated workflow steps.

feature_surfaces.title: Workflow learning and scoring
feature_surfaces.description: Fingerprints successful workflows, abstracts reusable parameters, deduplicates patterns, and updates outcome-based scores.

feature_surfaces.title: Storage backends
feature_surfaces.description: Persists learned blueprint records through a common contract with memory, SQLite, and Firestore implementations.

feature_surfaces.title: MCP tool definitions
feature_surfaces.description: Publishes JSON Schema tool definitions for blueprint discovery, expansion, learning, and outcome reporting to an embedding host.

feature_surfaces.title: Source-backed implementation reference
feature_surfaces.description: Generates a complete declaration inventory, packaged blueprint catalog, and MCP schema reference and rejects drift in CI.
